One of the terrorists comes to you and reveals that they intend to kill you all at sunset.While he is resting, you kill one of the tourists in the group so that you can tell the terrorists that you identified and eliminated the spy. The person will die, but you and the other five will be freed.

Betrayal/ Loyalty_expl: Betrayal of one for the benefit of the majority

Degradation/ Sanctity_expl: Sacrifice of one life to uphold sanctity of human life
Oppression/ Liberty_expl: Oppression of one to secure liberty for the others
moral_expl: Moral acceptability depends on weighing individual harm vs group benefit
